⬡ Polyhedron LoRA Inspector

nodes.title: Inspector Report LOW
widgets_values:
⬡ Polyhedron LoRA Inspector
  (no lora_info — connect uls_config_out from Stack v119+)

Polyhedron LoRA Stack - lean demo (native KSampler)

1. Pick your WAN 2.2 HIGH/LOW models in the two UNET loaders
   (GGUF users: swap in your GGUF loader).
2. Add LoRAs in the two Stacks (HIGH and LOW).
3. Sampling: HIGH 0-19 / LOW 19-36, CFG 4 - expert boundary preset.
4. Trigger insert from a thumbnail targets the Trigger Words nodes.

Requires: ComfyUI-KJNodes, ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts (text display).
